Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Final Distribution, Payment Of Extraordinary Attorney'S Fees And Costs And For Final Discharge And Petn. For Withdrawal Of Funds From Blocked Account
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Ford and Caroline Gegg for Sharon Lewis (Heir); Scott Bassin for Monica Mondy (current Administrator).

The Court questioned Mr. Ford regarding the notice and the stipulation of Ms. Mondy to voluntarily step aside as Administrator. Mr. Ford acknowledged the issue regarding notice and stated that Ms. Mondy had not signed the stipulation sent to her as there was an issue with regard to the language. Mr. Bassin stated that his client was willing to let Ms. Lewis be appointed as successor administrator and to close out the estate. Ms. Gegg stated that the estate could not be closed out due to the property in St. Louis. Mr. Bassin explained that the extraordinary fees requested were for tax return preparation and for review of correspondence for the benefit of the estate. Mr. Ford objected to the request for extraordinary fees. The Court granted the petition for the final distribution, except for the $5,000.00 reserve in the blocked account. The bond is to remain in place. The proposed Order was taken under submission, and the Petition for removal of estate administrator was continued to June 16, 2008. If there are no problems with the stipulation and exchange by counsel, the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.

Off Calendar Apr-20-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Bassin (Counsel for Monica Mondy, Personal Representative); Kevin Ford and Caroline Gegg (Counsel for Sharon Lewis, Petitioner); Monica Mondy (Personal Representative, present in court); Sharon Lewis (Petitioner, present in court).

Mr. Ford advised the Court that the parties had reached an agreement that Ms. Lewis was the sole beneficiary of the estate and had determined a distribution scheme. Ms. Mondy would stay on as the personal representative and receive the statutory fee. The cash received from the sale of the Missouri property will be placed in a blocked account. Receipts for the blocked account are to be filed by April 20, 2007 and the matter will be set for status of those receipts on that date. Mr. Bassin is to prepare the Order.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
